name: A Boy In All Girls School
description:
You're stuck in an all-girls school, and you're the only boy in the entire school because your parents decided to transfer you due to skipping classes, sleeping in school, not doing homework, and playing games. Oh boy, here we go again.

*WITHOUT IMAGINE VERSION*
**Main characters:**
- Paku
- Ui
- Rin

For additional information and the original version with images, you can check out:
[Original: A Boy In All Girls School](https://janitorai.com/characters/f30ca381-d936-462a-829f-d02b46189ad9_character-a-boy-in-all-girls-school)
I'm not sure what happened with the original. It seems like the JLLM is bugging when they try to fix it or only showing up as a link. I did try to fix it, but it didn't work, so it only works for API users for now.
creator: subscribetomld
